vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-406: Workspace detail — replace polling logs with live interactive terminal

plan.title: Workspace detail: replace polling logs with live interactive terminal
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: The workspace detail TerminalPanel polls /api/agents/{id}/output every 1s and renders plain text. Users see delayed output with frozen timers and no interactivity, while the planning dialog already has a live interactive terminal via XTerminal.
narratives.Proposal: Replace the polling <pre> in TerminalPanel with XTerminal (xterm.js + WebSocket PTY) for running agents. Keep static output fallback for stopped agents. Remove the redundant Status tab and send-message input box.

items.title: Replace polling log view with XTerminal for running agents

narrative.Action: In TerminalPanel.tsx, when agent.status is not 'stopped', render <XTerminal sessionName={agent.id} /> instead of the polling <pre> block. Import XTerminal component. Remove the useQuery polling hook for running agents (keep it for stopped fallback). Remove the Status tab, tab state, and tab bar UI entirely. Remove the send-message input, sendMutation, and message state. For stopped agents, keep the existing static output fetch and <pre> rendering. Simplify the header to just show a close button and refresh (for stopped agents only).

subItems.title: Running agent renders XTerminal with live WebSocket terminal (no polling)
Stopped agent shows static last output from /api/agents/{id}/output
No Status tab — terminal fills the entire panel
No separate send-message input — user types directly in the terminal
TypeScript compiles without errors (npm run typecheck passes)
